title: Indian Community Organizations
description: Associations, places of worship and cultural organizations for Indians in Belgium.

items.name: Indian Association of Belgium (sample)
items.description: Community welfare and cultural association for Indians in Belgium.

items.name: Hindu Temple Brussels (sample)
items.description: Community Hindu temple serving Brussels-area families.

items.name: Gurudwara Brussels (sample)
items.description: Sikh gurudwara offering weekly services and langar.

items.description: Congregation serving the Indian Christian community.

items.name: Belgo-Indian Cultural Circle (sample)
items.description: Promotes Indian classical dance, music and arts in Belgium.
